summary:
HEALING TESTIMONIES AND MINISTRY PLANS: Brandon shares a miraculous testimony of visiting a man originally to pray for an undetected clogged artery, only for the man to request prayer for two severe hernias. After laying hands on him, the hernias completely disappeared, eliminating the need for a scheduled surgery. Brandon credits the healing anointing placed upon him by Ralph Wilkerson at Melodyland Christian Center in 2001. He also reflects on past miracles, including a man receiving new lungs after chemical exposure, and shares his belief that his wife Diana will be used by God to resurrect babies deceased in the womb. Looking ahead, Brandon is believing for a major healing revival meeting at the Mabee Center at Oral Roberts University in Tulsa, featuring his friend Billy Burke ministering the services.

PERSONAL ACCOUNTABILITY AND SPIRITUAL DISCIPLINE: Brandon offers a public apology for his recent attitude and anger, confessing that he allowed himself to operate in the flesh rather than in the Spirit. He emphasizes the critical necessity of staying completely filled with the Holy Spirit and the Word of God to combat daily temptations. Drawing parallels to Jesus, who fought Satan's temptations in the wilderness by quoting scripture, Brandon explains that believers must balance Word and Spirit to effectively resist demonic attacks. He advises against yielding to a spirit of forebodings, teaching that believers must distinguish between genuine Holy Spirit warnings and demonic torment designed to induce fear.

GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND DOMESTIC THREATS: Brandon details several prophetic visions regarding global and domestic security. He warns of a planned terrorist attack at the Boston Marathon involving Middle Eastern individuals using 3D-printed explosive devices disguised as Coke cans hidden in trash receptacles. He urges vigilance during specific dates, including Rosh Hashanah, the Fourth of July, and mid-April, highlighting art festivals and marathons as targets for lone-wolf or ISIS-sympathizer attacks. Internationally, Brandon foresees significant disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz, envisioning thick black smoke, burning container ships, and a massive oil spill reminiscent of the BP disaster. He ties this to current geopolitical moves, noting Iran's threats and the release of strategic petroleum reserves to prevent oil from reaching two hundred dollars a barrel. Furthermore, he predicts severe cartel turf wars and major assassinations in Mexico.

POLITICAL FORECASTS AND GLOBAL SHAKINGS: Brandon outlines several political and supernatural events, including a blonde woman being groomed for a prominent political seat while playing the victim, and Marco Rubio becoming heavily focused on Cuba, Venezuela, and Mexico. He envisions an errand boy named Jared attempting to negotiate peace between Ukraine and Putin, alongside the emergence of two distinct diplomatic voices for the Middle East and Europe. Brandon warns of massive geological and supernatural disturbances, including a devastating earthquake in Rome that will shake the Vatican, active demonic portals at CERN summoning a World War II spirit over Europe, and intense seismic activity in the Ring of Fire triggering tsunami sirens in Hawaii and earthquakes in Japan. He also senses a need for heightened protective prayers for Eric and Don Jr., despite feeling a protective peace over President Trump, and mentions a decapitated venomous snake representing a continued, reflexive threat.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND CHURCH TRANSITION: Brandon recounts an unprecedented spiritual experience where an evil man plotting against England actively made eye contact with him during a vision, breaking his usual hidden observer status. He prophesies a massive changing of the guard within the church, where older spiritual generals will soon pass away to take on heavenly assignments, handing the baton to a younger generation who will operate in unprecedented power and manifestations. Additionally, Brandon notes that older believers facing unexpected forced retirements are actually being strategically freed by God to participate in the coming end-time harvest. He foresees a massive surge in deliverance ministries and instructs believers to handle demonic deliverances calmly and authoritatively, citing Billy Burke's handling of individuals connected to Charles Manson as the gold standard for avoiding theatrical spectacles. Finally, Brandon discusses his requirement for Spirit-filled, discerning individuals with military or law enforcement backgrounds to join his personal security detail.
